messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

  "title": "画面与音效表现",

message.content: This section addresses the topic of visual and audio performance. It can answer questions regarding graphical quality, sound design, and overall audio-visual presentation. No specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, tables, figures, or evidence types are detailed in the provided text.
